sha256.verificationNote: Reference was delivered as inline message content with UTF-8->Latin-1 mojibake (e.g. 'Ã¼', 'Ã©', 'â'), not as a byte-exact file. A byte-exact SHA-256 match cannot be confirmed from the corrupted inline copy. The readable content is sufficient for behavioral inventory (Package 1). Hash verification MUST be repeated once the raw file is committed to docs/reference/legacy-v3/kdp-workbook-studio.tsx.

contentReAudit.basis: full readable inline reference content (complete component through trailing CSS/SAMPLE; mojibake only in German in-book strings, not in logic or feature set)
contentReAudit.result: content-complete: no additional user-facing features found beyond LV3-001..108; cross-cutting states consolidated in behavior-spec §17
contentReAudit.requiredOwnerAction: commit the raw kdp-workbook-studio.tsx to docs/reference/legacy-v3/, then confirm SHA-256 and flip sha256.verified + byteSize.verified + lineCount.verified to true

archivedCurrentReference.purpose: Byte-exact verbatim archive of the current JSX version, used as the authoritative source for the exact parity port (rail, Idee, Gliederung, ...).
archivedCurrentReference.encoding: latin1 (ISO-8859-1 / Windows-1252); German umlauts are single-byte. Viewing as UTF-8 shows mojibake but the bytes are the canonical original. Do NOT re-encode to UTF-8 (that changes the hash).
archivedCurrentReference.verificationNote: Recovered byte-exact from the conversation transcript, written without UTF-8 re-encoding; wc -l -c + sha256sum on the committed file reproduce 3823 / 239911 / f8bc9fe... exactly.

origin: Working React/TSX single-file app 'KdpWorkbookStudio' (v2 UI label), provided by product owner as the authoritative product-behavior reference for the Legacy V3 integration.
usageConstraints: Never bundled into any production artifact
detectedSecurityRisks: Direct browser fetch to https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages (callModel, askClaudeWithSearch, askHiggsfieldImage) with no server proxy
Provider API access from the client; no server-side key custody
window.claude / window.storage host globals used for AI + persistence
Dynamic CDN <script> injection for pdf.js (loadScriptTag to cdnjs) at runtime
Custom hand-rolled ZIP/EPUB writer with Math.random()-based UUID (buildZip, buildEpub)
Browser print (window.print) presented as PDF production for print interior, cover and digital product
HTML content served with .doc extension as a purported Word export
Date.now()/Math.random() used as domain entity ids (project ids, chapter ids)
tryParseJson aggressively truncates/repairs malformed model JSON
Silently swallowed errors in multiple catch blocks (empty catch / comment-only)
No SSRF protection for research/image URLs; remote image URL used directly as the only asset reference (can expire)
